nodes.name: Wait till a day before interview

parameters.subject: Interview Reminder
parameters.message:
=
Hi {{ $('Airtable Trigger').item.json.fields['Full Name'] }} , 


Reminder: Your interview is scheduled for tomorrow. 
Good luck! 


HR Team

parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation -  {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.fields['Role Applied'] }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.fields['Full Name'] }} , 
Congratulations! You have been selected for the next stage of our hiring process. 
Your interview has been scheduled as follows: 
📅 Date: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.fields['Interview Date'] }}
👤 Role: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.fields['Role Applied'] }}
A Google Calendar invitation has been sent to you. Please check your email and join the meeting at the scheduled time.  If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email. 
Best regards, 
HR Team

parameters.subject: Update on Your Application
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.fields['Full Name'] }} ,  

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the role of {{ $json.fields['Role Applied'] }} and for your interest in joining our team.  We truly appreciate the effort you put into your application and the opportunity to learn more about your background. 
After reviewing your profile and qualifications, we have decided not to move forward with your application at this stage. This decision was based on our current requirements for this role. 
Please note that this does not reflect your overall potential, and we encourage you to apply for future opportunities that better match your experience and skills. 
We wish you the very best in your job search and future career. 

Kind regards, 
Recruitment Team

nodes.name: Update AI score and AI summary

values.content:
You are a professional HR recruiter and CV screening assistant. 
You evaluate candidates objectively based on job relevance, skills, and experience.
You MUST be strict, fair, and consistent in scoring.

=Evaluate this candidate CV for the role: 
{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.fields['Role Applied'] }}
Return ONLY in this format:

Score: X/100
Summary: short explanation of strengths and weaknesses

CV Content:
{{ $json.text }}

nodes.name: Extract AI score, summary and fulltext

main.node: Wait till a day before interview
Extract AI score, summary and fulltext
Update AI score and AI summary
